# companieswise

> Verified UK company lookup & number validation for AI agents. Returns a company's official
> Companies House registered details (name, status, type, incorporation date, registered postcode,
> primary SIC) by its company number, validates a UK company number's format, or finds a number by
> name — from the official Companies House register snapshot, not the model's memory. Ships as an
> MCP server and a typed TypeScript library. By Qiniso — verified, trustworthy data tools for AI agents.

## What it does
- lookup_company: official registered details for a UK company by number. Honest "not found" if absent.
- validate_company_number: is a UK company number well-formed (8 digits, or 2-letter prefix + 6 digits; no check digit) and what does the prefix denote (SC=Scotland, NI=Northern Ireland, OC=LLP, …).
- search_company: reverse lookup — find a company's number from its registered name.

## Why
LLMs confidently invent company names, statuses and dates for a given company number. companieswise returns the official Companies House record by lookup, or an honest "not found" — never a guess.

## Scope and limits (important)
- UK-wide (England & Wales, Scotland, Northern Ireland).
- MONTHLY snapshot of the LIVE register. Company status is AS OF the dataset date, NOT real-time; dissolved companies are generally absent (absent ≠ never existed). For current status, check the live Companies House register.
- Not legal, financial, credit or KYC/AML advice; not a statutory due-diligence check.

## Data
Companies House "Free Company Data Product" (~5.6M companies, UK-wide), Open Government Licence v3.0. Too large to bundle in npm, so the code ships on npm and the data is built monthly by CI into a GitHub Release artifact that `companieswise-update` downloads to a local cache. No API key, no rate limit, no per-request cost. Every response reports its datasetVersion (snapshot date). Contains public sector information from Companies House licensed under the OGL v3.0; © Crown copyright.

## Install
- Local MCP: npx -y companieswise   (then run `npx companieswise-update` once for the real data)
- Library: npm install companieswise
- A hosted, real-time endpoint (Cloudflare D1 + Companies House Streaming API) is a planned follow-on.

## Links
- Repo: https://github.com/qinisolabs/companieswise
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/companieswise
- License: Apache-2.0 (code); company data © Crown copyright, Companies House, OGL v3.0
